movie_ticket_attribute_date_and_time_of_: Date and time of the show
movie_ticket_description_ticket_number: Ticket identification/reference number issued at the purchase time.
movie_ticket_description_cinema_theater: Cinema theater name, and/or address/location of the admission.
movie_ticket_description_movie_title: Movie name, title, and any other show identification information.
movie_ticket_description_date_and_time_o: Date and time when the movie starts
movie_ticket_description_age_rating_code: Movie rating code for age restrictions.
movie_ticket_description_theater: Name or number of the theater in a multi-theater cinema building.
movie_ticket_description_parking: Flag if car parking is prepaid with the ticket purchase.
naturalization_description_family_name: Current last name(s), surname(s), or primary identifier of the naturalized person
naturalization_description_given_names: Current first name(s), other name(s), or secondary identifier of the naturalized person
naturalization_description_date_of_birth: Day, month, and year on which the naturalized person was born. If unknown, approximate date of birth.
naturalization_description_date_of_natur: Date (and possibly time) when the person was naturalized.
boarding_pass_description_passenger_name: Last name, surname, or primary identifier, of the mDL holder.
boarding_pass_description_departure_time: The date of time of departure
loyalty_description_family_name: Last name, surname, or primary identifier, of the document holder
loyalty_description_given_names: First name(s), other name(s), or secondary identifier, of the document holder
loyalty_description_photo_of_holder: A reproduction of the document holder's portrait.
loyalty_description_membership_id: Person identifier of the Loyalty ID holder.
loyalty_description_tier: Membership tier (basic, silver, gold, platinum, elite)
german_id_description_family_name: Current last name(s), surname(s), or primary identifier of the PID holder
german_id_description_given_names: Current first name(s), other name(s), or secondary identifier of the PID holder
german_id_description_date_of_birth: Day, month, and year on which the PID holder was born. If unknown, approximate date of birth.
german_id_description_age_in_years: The age of the PID holder in years
german_id_description_year_of_birth: The year when the PID holder was born
german_id_description_family_name_at_bir: Last name(s), surname(s), or primary identifier of the PID holder at birth
german_id_description_place_of_birth: Country and municipality or state/province where the PID holder was born
german_id_description_country_of_birth: The country where the PID User was born, as an Alpha-2 country code as specified in ISO 3166-1
german_id_description_state_of_birth: The state, province, district, or local area where the PID User was born
german_id_description_city_of_birth: The municipality, city, town, or village where the PID User was born
german_id_description_resident_address: The full address of the place where the PID holder currently resides and/or may be contacted (street/house number, municipality etc.)
german_id_description_resident_city: The city where the PID holder currently resides
german_id_description_resident_country: The country where the PID User currently resides, as an Alpha-2 country code as specified in ISO 3166-1
german_id_description_resident_postal_co: The postal code of the place where the PID holder currently resides
german_id_description_nationality: List of Alpha-2 country codes as specified in ISO 3166-1, representing the nationality of the PID User.
german_id_description_date_of_issue: Date (and possibly time) when the PID was issued.
german_id_description_date_of_expiry: Date (and possibly time) when the PID will expire.
german_id_description_issuing_authority: Name of the administrative authority that has issued this PID instance, or the ISO 3166 Alpha-2 country code of the respective Member State if there is no separate authority authorized to issue PIDs.
german_id_description_document_number: A number for the PID, assigned by the PID Provider.
german_id_description_administrative_num: A number assigned by the PID Provider for audit control or other purposes.
german_id_description_issuing_jurisdicti: Country subdivision code of the jurisdiction that issued the PID, as defined in ISO 3166-2:2020, Clause 8. The first part of the code SHALL be the same as the value for issuing_country.
german_id_description_issuing_country: Alpha-2 country code, as defined in ISO 3166-1, of the issuing authority's country or territory
payment_description_masked_account_refer: Masked account reference, for example PAN last 4.
payment_description_issue_date: Date when this credential was issued.
cor_description_family_name: Current last name(s), surname(s), or primary identifier of the COR holder
cor_description_given_names: Current first name(s), other name(s), or secondary identifier of the COR holder
cor_description_date_of_birth: Day, month, and year on which the COR holder was born. If unknown, approximate date of birth.
cor_description_date_of_arrival: Day, month, and year on which the COR holder arrived to the EU.
cor_description_resident_address: The full address of the place where the COR holder currently resides and/or may be contacted (street/house number, municipality etc.)
cor_description_resident_country: The country where the user currently resides, as an Alpha-2 country code as specified in ISO 3166-1
cor_description_resident_state: The state, province, district, or local area where the user currently resides.
cor_description_resident_city: The city where the COR holder currently resides
cor_description_resident_postal_code: The postal code of the place where the COR holder currently resides
cor_description_resident_street: The name of the street where the user currently resides.
cor_description_resident_house_number: The house number where the user currently resides, including any affix or suffix
cor_description_place_of_birth: The place where the COR holder was born.
cor_description_nationality: Alpha-2 country code as specified in ISO 3166-1, representing the nationality of the user.
cor_description_date_of_issue: Date (and possibly time) when the COR was issued.
cor_description_date_of_expiry: Date (and possibly time) when the COR will expire.
cor_description_issuing_authority: Name of the administrative authority that has issued this COR instance, or the ISO 3166 Alpha-2 country code of the respective Member State if there is no separate authority authorized to issue CORs.
cor_description_document_number: A number for the COR, assigned by the COR Provider.
cor_description_administrative_number: A number assigned by the COR Provider for audit control or other purposes.
cor_description_issuing_jurisdiction: Country subdivision code of the jurisdiction that issued the COR, as defined in ISO 3166-2:2020, Clause 8. The first part of the code SHALL be the same as the value for issuing_country.
cor_description_issuing_country: Alpha-2 country code, as defined in ISO 3166-1, of the issuing authority's country or territory
